name: PROACTIVEMEDICAL.COM
message: [AI generated] Proactive Medical Products is a New York-based company specializing in therapeutic healthcare products. Their range includes pressure redistribution surfaces, patient protection products and mobility aids that cater to long-term and home care health settings. They are known for high-quality products to help manage and prevent conditions like bed sores and infections. Their products are designed to ensure the comfort, safety, and quality of life for patients.
